name: cloud-default
description: Default safety policy for cloud infrastructure operations (Terraform, AWS, GCP, Azure)

rules.description: Deny terraform destroy without -target — would destroy ALL resources in state
rules.message: terraform destroy without -target will destroy ALL managed resources. Specify -target=<resource_type.name> to limit scope.

rules.description: Deny VPC and subnet deletion — breaks entire network environments
rules.message: VPC/subnet deletion is irreversible and can take down entire environments. Requires human escalation outside of SafeExecutor.

rules.description: Require approval for database instance deletion (RDS, Cloud SQL, Azure SQL)
rules.message: Database deletion is irreversible and destroys all data. Explicit approval required.

rules.description: Require approval for IAM role, policy, and identity modifications
rules.message: IAM/AD modifications affect authentication and authorization for all services. Approval required.

rules.description: Require approval for security group deletion
rules.message: Security group deletion can lock out or expose resources that depend on it.

rules.description: High risk for security group ingress/egress modifications
rules.message: Security group rule changes can expose services to the internet or block legitimate traffic.

rules.description: Require approval before deleting S3 buckets
rules.message: S3 bucket deletion permanently removes all stored data. Approval required.

rules.description: Require approval for any operation using the --force flag
rules.message: The --force flag bypasses safety confirmations. Explicit approval required.

rules.description: Allow all read-only operations (describe, list, get, show, plan)
Simulate all write operations before execution
Require approval for all destroy/delete/terminate operations
rules.message: Destructive cloud operations are irreversible. Explicit approval required.

rules.description: Require approval for Terraform state modifications (state rm/mv, taint)
rules.message: Terraform state modifications can corrupt infrastructure state and cause drift.
